webServer.command: npm run build && npm run preview -- --port 4390 --strictPort

specs.title: lands on /admin
can view accounts
can filter to coaches and clients
can open a client detail read-only
can view analytics if allowed
can view audit logs if allowed
create form does NOT offer admin/super_admin roles (no self-promotion)
cannot edit a super_admin account (UI blocks it)
rules BLOCK: admin cannot promote a user to super_admin

specs.title: rules ALLOW: admin can read a client identity doc (oversight)
client walks the wizard, saves a draft, then submits
coach sees the submitted assessment and marks it reviewed
admin can read the assessment but cannot write it

specs.title: coach reset re-opens the assessment for the client
sees the assigned workout plan (not the waiting state)
workout plan persisted with the exact coach-set set counts (warm-up-only + working-only)
opens a routine and sees rest time, video and instructions
can start a workout, log a set (weight × reps), and finish
sees the assigned nutrition plan + coach targets
can mark a meal eaten and log water
sees the assigned cardio plan and can log activity
cardio plan + targets persisted as coach set them
can view the coach note
logs in with coach-created credentials and lands on the client app
home shows "waiting for your coach" and no plan
workout + nutrition pages show the waiting empty-state
no legacy seed data / no hardcoded Mohamed profile
targets are blank/zero (no stale coach targets)
profile is dynamic (not the hardcoded legacy values)
coach adds a library exercise into a client plan (deep copy)
editing the library exercise does NOT change the client plan copy
opens the Library from the bottom nav
creates an exercise in the library (with a quick preset)
library exercise persisted under coachAssets with preset values
search filters the library
edits an existing library exercise
deletes a library exercise
lands on /coach and shows the clients list
creates a client (name + email + temp password); active + auto-assigned
opens the created client detail
authors a full workout plan via the drill-down builder (day → section → exercise)
authors a nutrition plan (meals, foods, macros, targets, water)
authors a cardio plan (sessions: type, duration, frequency, notes)
sets coach targets (steps / cardio / water)
adds a coach note
can view client activity
cannot reach admin pages (redirected back to coach)
coach nav has no admin/governance tabs
rules BLOCK: coach cannot read an unassigned client clientData
rules BLOCK: coach cannot change a user role

specs.title: template persisted under coachAssets/workoutTemplates
assigning the template writes an INDEPENDENT snapshot with meta
editing the assigned plan flips isCustomized and leaves the template UNCHANGED
editing the template later does NOT change the already-assigned plan
client sees the assigned sectioned plan and CANNOT edit it
